strings.schematron.title: Mobility (v3.0.0)
strings.mobility-300.pattern.assert.1: Access URL is mandatory. Exactly one access URL must be provided as an IRI (dcat:accessURL)
strings.mobility-300.pattern.assert.10: Publisher is mandatory. Exactly one publisher must be provided (dct:publisher)
strings.mobility-300.pattern.assert.11: Title is mandatory, must have a valid EU language tag, cannot be empty, and each language can appear only once (dct:title)
strings.mobility-300.pattern.assert.12: Conditions for access and usage is mandatory. Must be from the mobilityDCAT-AP controlled vocabulary (dct:type)
strings.mobility-300.pattern.assert.13: Homepage is mandatory and there must be exactly one (foaf:homepage)
strings.mobility-300.pattern.assert.14: Title is mandatory, must have a valid EU language tag (BCP47), cannot be empty, and each language can appear only once (dct:title)
strings.mobility-300.pattern.assert.15: Description is mandatory, must have a valid EU language tag (BCP47), cannot be empty, and each language can appear only once (dct:description)
strings.mobility-300.pattern.assert.16: Title is mandatory. At least one title must be provided as a literal (dct:title)
strings.mobility-300.pattern.assert.17: Description is mandatory, must have a valid EU language tag, cannot be empty, and each language can appear only once (dct:description)
strings.mobility-300.pattern.assert.18: Distribution is mandatory. At least one distribution must be provided (dcat:distribution)
strings.mobility-300.pattern.assert.19: Frequency is mandatory. Exactly one value from EU Frequency vocabulary (http://publications.europa.eu/resource/authority/frequency/*) or mobilityDCAT-AP update-frequency vocabulary must be provided (dct:accrualPeriodicity)
strings.mobility-300.pattern.assert.2: Mobility data standard is mandatory. Must be either a URI from https://w3id.org/mobilitydcat-ap/mobility-data-standard/ vocabulary OR a mobilitydcatap:MobilityDataStandard instance (mobilitydcatap:mobilityDataStandard)
strings.mobility-300.pattern.assert.20: Mobility theme is mandatory. At least one theme from the controlled vocabulary (https://w3id.org/mobilitydcat-ap/mobility-theme/*) must be provided (mobilitydcatap:mobilityTheme)
strings.mobility-300.pattern.assert.21: Spatial coverage is mandatory. At least one geographical area must be provided (dct:spatial)
strings.mobility-300.pattern.assert.22: Title is mandatory, must have a valid EU language tag (e.g., @en), cannot be empty, and each language can appear only once (dct:title)
strings.mobility-300.pattern.assert.23: Publisher is mandatory. Exactly one publisher must be provided (dct:publisher)
strings.mobility-300.pattern.assert.3: Format is mandatory. Exactly one format from http://publications.europa.eu/resource/authority/file-type/* must be provided (dct:format)
strings.mobility-300.pattern.assert.4: Rights is mandatory. Exactly one rights statement must be provided (dct:rights)
strings.mobility-300.pattern.assert.5: Email is mandatory. Exactly one email must be provided as an IRI (mailto: scheme) (vcard:hasEmail)
strings.mobility-300.pattern.assert.6: Name is mandatory. Exactly one name must be provided as a literal (vcard:fn)
strings.mobility-300.pattern.assert.7: Preferred label is mandatory. At least one preferred label must be provided as a literal (skos:prefLabel)
strings.mobility-300.pattern.assert.8: Category scheme must be a blank node or IRI and can appear at most once (skos:inScheme)
strings.mobility-300.pattern.assert.9: Description is mandatory, must have a valid EU language tag, cannot be empty, and each language can appear only once (dct:description)
strings.mobility-300.pattern.report.1: Access URL is mandatory. Exactly one access URL must be provided as an IRI (dcat:accessURL)
strings.mobility-300.pattern.report.10: Publisher is mandatory. Exactly one publisher must be provided (dct:publisher)
strings.mobility-300.pattern.report.11: Title is mandatory, must have a valid EU language tag, cannot be empty, and each language can appear only once (dct:title)
strings.mobility-300.pattern.report.12: Conditions for access and usage is mandatory. Must be from the mobilityDCAT-AP controlled vocabulary (dct:type)
strings.mobility-300.pattern.report.13: Homepage is mandatory and there must be exactly one (foaf:homepage)
strings.mobility-300.pattern.report.14: Title is mandatory, must have a valid EU language tag (BCP47), cannot be empty, and each language can appear only once (dct:title)
strings.mobility-300.pattern.report.15: Description is mandatory, must have a valid EU language tag (BCP47), cannot be empty, and each language can appear only once (dct:description)
strings.mobility-300.pattern.report.16: Title is mandatory. At least one title must be provided as a literal (dct:title)
strings.mobility-300.pattern.report.17: Description is mandatory, must have a valid EU language tag, cannot be empty, and each language can appear only once (dct:description)
strings.mobility-300.pattern.report.18: Distribution is mandatory. At least one distribution must be provided (dcat:distribution)
strings.mobility-300.pattern.report.19: Frequency is mandatory. Exactly one value from EU Frequency vocabulary (http://publications.europa.eu/resource/authority/frequency/*) or mobilityDCAT-AP update-frequency vocabulary must be provided (dct:accrualPeriodicity)
strings.mobility-300.pattern.report.2: Mobility data standard is mandatory. Must be either a URI from https://w3id.org/mobilitydcat-ap/mobility-data-standard/ vocabulary OR a mobilitydcatap:MobilityDataStandard instance (mobilitydcatap:mobilityDataStandard)
strings.mobility-300.pattern.report.20: Mobility theme is mandatory. At least one theme from the controlled vocabulary (https://w3id.org/mobilitydcat-ap/mobility-theme/*) must be provided (mobilitydcatap:mobilityTheme)
strings.mobility-300.pattern.report.21: Spatial coverage is mandatory. At least one geographical area must be provided (dct:spatial)
strings.mobility-300.pattern.report.22: Title is mandatory, must have a valid EU language tag (e.g., @en), cannot be empty, and each language can appear only once (dct:title)
strings.mobility-300.pattern.report.23: Publisher is mandatory. Exactly one publisher must be provided (dct:publisher)
strings.mobility-300.pattern.report.3: Format is mandatory. Exactly one format from http://publications.europa.eu/resource/authority/file-type/* must be provided (dct:format)
strings.mobility-300.pattern.report.4: Rights is mandatory. Exactly one rights statement must be provided (dct:rights)
strings.mobility-300.pattern.report.5: Email is mandatory. Exactly one email must be provided as an IRI (mailto: scheme) (vcard:hasEmail)
strings.mobility-300.pattern.report.6: Name is mandatory. Exactly one name must be provided as a literal (vcard:fn)
strings.mobility-300.pattern.report.7: Preferred label is mandatory. At least one preferred label must be provided as a literal (skos:prefLabel)
strings.mobility-300.pattern.report.8: Category scheme must be a blank node or IRI and can appear at most once (skos:inScheme)
strings.mobility-300.pattern.report.9: Description is mandatory, must have a valid EU language tag, cannot be empty, and each language can appear only once (dct:description)
strings.mobility-300.pattern.title.1: Access url - A URL that gives access to a Distribution of the Dataset.
strings.mobility-300.pattern.title.14: Title - A name given to the Catalogue. Must have valid EU language tag, cannot be empty, each language can appear only once (§8).
strings.mobility-300.pattern.title.15: Description - A free-text account of the Catalogue. Must have valid EU language tag, cannot be empty, each language can appear only once (§8).
strings.mobility-300.pattern.title.16: Title - A name of the Category Scheme. May be repeated for different versions of the name.
strings.mobility-300.pattern.title.17: Description - This property contains more information about the dataset as a brief, free-text description. This property can be repeated for parallel language versions of the description (§8).
strings.mobility-300.pattern.title.18: Dataset distribution - This property links the dataset to an available distribution. In mobilityDCAT-AP, it is mandatory that each dataset has at least one distribution.
strings.mobility-300.pattern.title.19: Frequency - This property describes how often the delivered content is updated. The obligation of this property is raised to 'mandatory' in mobilityDCAT-AP (§4.10.1).
strings.mobility-300.pattern.title.2: Mobility data standard - The mobility data standard applied for the delivered content (§4.18).
strings.mobility-300.pattern.title.20: Mobility theme - This property refers to the mobility-related theme (i.e., a specific subject, category, or type) of the delivered content. A dataset may be associated with multiple themes (§4.10.1).
strings.mobility-300.pattern.title.21: Spatial / geographic coverage - This property refers to a geographic region that is covered by the delivered content. The obligation of this property is raised to 'mandatory' in mobilityDCAT-AP (§4.10.1).
strings.mobility-300.pattern.title.22: Title - This property contains a name given to the dataset in a generic term. The name should be a meaningful, unique and unambiguous label. This property can be repeated for parallel language versions (§8).
strings.mobility-300.pattern.title.23: Publisher - This property refers to an entity (company and person) that publishes the corresponding dataset. The obligation of this property is raised to 'mandatory' in mobilityDCAT-AP (§4.10.1).
strings.mobility-300.pattern.title.3: Format - The technical syntax of the delivered content. Made mandatory in mobilityDCAT-AP (§4.11.1). Must be from EU File Type vocabulary (§5.2).
strings.mobility-300.pattern.title.4: Rights - A Rights Statement about intellectual property rights. Made mandatory in mobilityDCAT-AP (§4.11.1).
strings.mobility-300.pattern.title.7: Preferred label - A preferred label of the Category. This property can be repeated for parallel language versions of the label.
strings.mobility-300.pattern.title.8: Category scheme - The Category Scheme to which the Category belongs. This property is analogous to an addition by GeoDCAT-AP v2.0.0.
